error_signature: Gmail node sending 2 emails per interaction
title: Gmail node sends duplicate emails
symptom: The Gmail node is sending two emails for each interaction triggered by the webhook. This issue started recently and persists despite attempts to adjust settings.
not_this_if: Only one email is sent in manual testing
root_cause: The issue may arise from the short time interval between webhook activations, causing the Gmail node to process multiple requests simultaneously. This can lead to duplicate email sends if the workflow is not properly throttled.
fix_steps: Add a 'wait' node between the webhook trigger and the Gmail node
Configure the wait time to ensure sufficient delay between executions
Test the workflow to confirm that only one email is sent per interaction
agent_instruction: Insert a 'wait' node in your workflow to prevent duplicate emails from the Gmail node.
